hero.lead: Air, ocean and customs freight without intermediaries: a dedicated executive who knows your operation end to end.

services.title: Solutions for every need
services.desc: From urgent dispatch to full supply chain consulting. Every account has a dedicated executive who designs the route tailored to you.

01.title: Air Freight
01.desc: Express, international courier and air charter with guaranteed transit times.

02.title: Ocean Freight
02.desc: FCL and LCL to 80+ ports. We consolidate to cut costs.

03.title: Customs & Documentation
03.desc: DUS, certificates of origin and tariff classification.

04.title: Warehousing
04.desc: Storage, fulfillment and last-mile with real-time inventory.

05.title: Logistics Consulting
05.desc: A tailored supply chain that reduces costs and lead times.

06.title: International Courier
06.desc: Express door-to-door shipments with global coverage.

07.title: Cargo Insurance
07.desc: Comprehensive coverage throughout the entire journey.

08.title: Deconsolidation
08.desc: Receipt, split and distribution from port.

09.title: USA Mailbox
09.desc: Your own U.S. address for online shopping.

10.title: International Procurement
10.desc: Full advisory: suppliers, payments and logistics.

11.title: Middle East Route
11.desc: Specialized connection with trusted local partners.

industries.title: Sectors we move
industries.desc: 12 industries with specialized operations, particular regulations and optimized routes.

cta.lead: Get a quote in under 24 hours with a dedicated executive. No intermediaries, no surprises.

footer.brandDesc: Chilean logistics operator with 20+ years connecting companies with 70+ countries. Air, ocean and customs freight, with no intermediaries.

home.title: Air and Ocean Logistics
home.description: LOG ATM — Air freight, ocean freight, customs and warehousing solutions tailored for Chilean companies. Get a quote now.

nosotros.title: About
nosotros.description: Meet LOG ATM: a Chilean international logistics company with 15+ years of experience in air, ocean and customs freight.
nosotros.lead: We are a Chilean team with global connections and the commitment to treat you like our only client.
nosotros.card1Desc: Since 2009 connecting Chile with the world. We have grown alongside our clients, adapting to every challenge in international trade.
nosotros.card2Desc: Strategic alliances with agents in 80+ countries. Wherever there is a port or airport, we have a trusted partner.
nosotros.card3Desc: Every client has an assigned executive who knows their business and anticipates their needs. We are not a faceless multinational.
nosotros.card4Desc: Operators certified by Chile's National Customs Service. We meet the highest standards of quality and safety.
nosotros.quoteText: "Our mission is simple: make international trade accessible for any Chilean company. No matter the size of your cargo, there is always a solution."
